ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Continued To Sep-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Spalding, via Zoom, for and with Phillip Lee, Personal Representative.

The court points counsel to the non-appearance at the previous calling of this matter. Mr. Spalding testifies as to the reason he did not appear. The court points counsel to the notice of issue which appears to be untimely. Counsel reports that he is working on the notice issue and the additional outstanding items as reported to him by the Probate Examiner and believes that he can clear the notes within six to eight weeks. The court advises counsel to work diligently to clear the notes.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The remaining matter is continued to Aug-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Phillip Lee and his attorney Michael Spalding to appear on Jul-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why an amended petition has not been filed. An Order to Show Cause why the Court should not impose Sanctions of $250 each on Executor Phillip Lee and attorney Michael Spalding for failure to appear and failure to address the Examiner's notes is set for the same date. The status hearing is also continued to that date. If no one appears at the next calling of this matter, the court will consider imposing further sanctions.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court finds that the matter was properly noticed and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 15, 2011 is admitted to probate. Phillip Lee is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
